hero.description: Digitize, streamline, and secure your organizational knowledge with our enterprise-grade SOP module. Built for high-reliability sectors requiring ultimate version control and bulletproof audit trails.

showcases.title: Command Center for Compliance
showcases.description: Get a bird's-eye view of your entire procedural landscape. Track pending approvals, upcoming review cycles, and team training progress entirely in real-time.

showcases.title: Rich Procedure Authoring
showcases.description: Say goodbye to static PDFs. Our dynamic editor allows you to build interactive, media-rich Standard Operating Procedures that teams actually understand.
list: Automated versioning completely hidden from the author

showcases.title: Blockchain-Backed Audit Trails
showcases.description: Every signature, approval, and version change is recorded on an immutable ledger, ensuring absolute data integrity that satisfies the strictest global regulators.
list: Immutable record of all document interactions
FDA 21 CFR Part 11 compliant digital signatures
Instant cryptographic verification of audit logs

features.title: Compliant by Design
features.description: Built to meet strict regulatory standards including FDA 21 CFR Part 11, GAMP 5, and ISO 9001.

features.title: Smart Versioning
features.description: Automated version control with zero manual file renaming. Always access the single source of truth.

features.title: Role-Based Security
features.description: Granular permissions control precisely who can view, edit, or approve specific quality documents.

features.title: AI-Powered Search
features.description: Intelligent indexing and NLP search allow users to find critical procedures using natural language queries.

features.title: Periodic Reviews
features.description: Automated review cycles ensure your procedures never fall out of date or out of compliance.

features.title: Multimedia Ready
features.description: Embed instructional videos and high-res diagrams directly into procedures for faster training.
